final:
module top_module
(
    input clk,
    input sreset,
    output reg [5:0] count
);always @(posedge clk)
        if (sreset) begin
            count <= 6'b111111;
        end else begin
            count <= count - 1;
        end
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      count <= count + 1;
    end
  end

endmodule
